details.question: Give me class 6 students in Anantapur with 12 or more absences in 2025, including school and social category.
details.generated_sql:
SELECT s.citizen_student_id, s.school_name, s.school_category, s.school_medium, s.school_address, s.social_category, s.absence_count, s.absent_reason_code, s.absent_reason_category, s.created_at
FROM citizen_student s
JOIN school_school s ON s.citizen_school_id_fk = s.school_id
WHERE s.absence_count >= 12
AND s.created_at LIKE '2025%'
ORDER BY s.absence_count DESC;
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              st.citizen_student_id_pk,
              st.student_name,
              st.gender,
              st.social_category,
              st.current_grade,
              sc.school_udise_code,
              sc.school_name,
              sc.mandal_name,
              COUNT(*) AS absent_days
            FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_student st
              ON st.citizen_student_id_pk = att.citizen_student_id_fk
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
            WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'
              AND att.absent_flag = 'Y'
              AND st.current_grade = '6'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
              AND COALESCE(st.is_current_flag, st.is_current) = 'Y'
            GROUP BY
              st.citizen_student_id_pk, st.student_name, st.gender,
              st.social_category, st.current_grade, sc.school_udise_code,
              sc.school_name, sc.mandal_name
            HAVING COUNT(*) >= 12
            ORDER BY absent_days DESC
details.error:
(sqlite3.OperationalError) no such table: school_school
[SQL: SELECT s.citizen_student_id, s.school_name, s.school_category, s.school_medium, s.school_address, s.social_category, s.absence_count, s.absent_reason_code, s.absent_reason_category, s.created_at
FROM citizen_student s
JOIN school_school s ON s.citizen_school_id_fk = s.school_id
WHERE s.absence_count >= 12
AND s.created_at LIKE '2025%'
ORDER BY s.absence_count DESC;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/e3q8)

details.question: Which schools in Anantapur have attendance below 55% in 2025-26?
details.generated_sql: SELECT citizen_school.citizen_school_id, school_name, attendance_percentage FROM school_student_attendance_fact JOIN citizen_school ON school_student_attendance_fact.student_school_id_fk = citizen_school.citizen_school_id_pk WHERE district = 'Anantapur' AND attendance_percentage < 55 ORDER BY attendance_percentage ASC
details.ground_truth_sql:
SELECT
              sc.district_name,
              sc.mandal_name,
              sc.school_udise_code,
              sc.school_name,
              COUNT(*) AS attendance_records,
              SUM(CASE WHEN att.present_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS present_records,
              ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN att.present_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) AS attendance_pct
            FROM curated_datamodels.school_student_attendance_fact att
            JOIN curated_datamodels.citizen_school sc
              ON sc.citizen_school_id_pk = att.student_school_id_fk
            WHERE att.academic_year = '2025'
              AND sc.district_name = 'Anantapur'
            GROUP BY sc.district_name, sc.mandal_name, sc.school_udise_code, sc.school_name
            HAVING ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN att.present_flag = 'Y' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) < 55
            ORDER BY attendance_pct ASC, attendance_records DESC
details.error:
(sqlite3.OperationalError) no such column: citizen_school.citizen_school_id
[SQL: SELECT citizen_school.citizen_school_id, school_name, attendance_percentage FROM school_student_attendance_fact JOIN citizen_school ON school_student_attendance_fact.student_school_id_fk = citizen_school.citizen_school_id_pk WHERE district = 'Anantapur' AND attendance_percentage < 55 ORDER BY attendance_percentage ASC]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/e3q8)
